concept: I want an action game where the player wields a weapon that can cut through the fabric of reality itself, creating temporary rifts that lead to parallel dimensions. Each dimension operates on slightly different physical laws that the player must quickly adapt to when fighting enemies or solving puzzles that span multiple realities. The rifts remain open briefly, allowing strategic movement between dimensions or forcing enemies into unfavorable environments. The protagonist discovers that excessive tearing between dimensions is causing catastrophic bleed-through effects that threaten to merge all realities chaotically. The ultimate goal shifts from exploiting the dimensional tears to carefully sealing critical junctions while fending off entities that have become adapted to exploiting the weakened barriers.
